python_compile.description: Compile all Python repository tooling that is part of the Python-first path.
python_compile.command: python -B tools/quality/check_python_syntax.py tools/shared/command_result_helpers.py tools/pipeline/python_runtime.py tools/pipeline/pipeline_package.py tools/pipeline/pipeline_sweep.py tools/pipeline/sync_managed_pipeline_package.py tools/pipeline/update_pipeline_from_link.py tools/pipeline/Initialize-SocratexPipeline.py tools/pipeline/rebuild_ai_compiled_context.py tools/pipeline/compile_pipeline_context.py tools/pipeline/read_compiled_context.py tools/repo/check_pipeline_feature_contracts.py tools/repo/sync_pipeline_featurelist.py tools/repo/check_sensitive_reference_leaks.py tools/repo/run_final_task_checks.py tools/repo/finalize_changed_files_commit_push.py tools/repo/task_snapshot.py tools/repo/end_prompt_snapshot.py tools/repo/task_flow_audit.py tools/documents/audit_docs.py tools/documents/build_document_cache.py tools/codebase/update_code_line_index.py tools/knowledge/context_tags.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_select.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_code_context.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_tier_check.py tools/quality/check_runtime.py tools/quality/check_evals.py tools/quality/check_python_syntax.py tools/quality/run_quality_gate.py tools/quality/run_quality_gate_contract.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_check.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_compile.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_file_check.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_file_compile.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_file_select.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_cli.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_delete.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_query.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_rename.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_upsert.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_file_delete.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_file_query.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_file_rename.py tools/knowledge/knowledge_file_upsert.py tools/json/json_wrapper_entrypoints.py tools/json/json_refresh_index.py tools/json/json_migrate_content.py tools/json/json_node_edit.py tools/json/json_read.py tools/json/json_item_insert.py tools/json/json_item_set.py tools/json/json_item_move.py tools/json/json_item_delete.py tools/json/json_line_insert.py tools/json/json_line_set.py tools/json/json_line_move.py tools/json/smoke_json_tools.py

eval_framework.description: Check manual eval framework structure and internal links.

sensitive_reference_smoke.description: Check that private project, domain, and identity references have not leaked into the source pipeline.

transactional_doc_tools.description: Check Python JSON document tooling and feature-contract coverage.
transactional_doc_tools.command: python -B tools/json/json_list_doc.py read SCRIPTS.json && python -B tools/json/smoke_json_tools.py && python -B tools/repo/check_pipeline_feature_contracts.py

init_dry_run.description: Smoke-test code project initialization without writing files.

notes: Providers differ; CI should translate these commands into the provider's shell syntax.
The audit command is the canonical minimum self-check.

metadata.title: Quality Gate
metadata.role: Source pipeline smoke and self-check command contract.
metadata.compatibility: tools/quality/run_quality_gate_contract.py accepts the legacy root commands shape as migration input; the legacy root command shape is accepted only as migration input during retirement.
